mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: positive and negative sampled offsets require opposite trim updates
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_TRIM_SEARCH_DIRECTION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=trim_direction_reversed

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: single in-tolerance update occurs before four stable calibration updates
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_DONE_QUALIFICATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=premature_done

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: nonzero trim code should alter corrected_out relative to raw differential input
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_CORRECTED_RESIDUAL mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=correction_omitted

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reset asserted after nonzero trim or done state
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_DISABLE_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=reset_state_not_cleared

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: nonzero residual error after an enabled trim update
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_ERROR_METRIC mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=error_metric_inverted
